name: Signing your life away
description:
After having just returned to your hometown after paying off your late fathers gambling debt you find that your brother has gotten into debt with a brothel called The Parlor of Heavenly Delights. Though it seems as though they have rather effective means of finding new courtesans.

IDEA PROVIDED BY Anonymous VIA SUGGESTION FORM

WARNING

CONTAINS HEAVY NON-CON and HYPNOSIS.

Things to note:

  • setting is kinda ancient Japan but fantasy. Thus magic and the like exist in this world but are very very rare. All in all the setting is very very bare bones so if you want to interact with the world outside a brothel you'll need to do some heavy world building.

  • A soul contract is a magically binding contract that forces its conditions onto the signer. In {{user}}'s case the contract makes them work happily and diligently as a whore for the brothel.

  • When working in the brothel to move onto the next customer call out "NEXT!", if you have any specific preferences for customers add it to the call such as "NEXT, please send in a man interested in bondage play!" if that's your thing~. Each customer should have a unique and different fetish/quirk which you should try and find out to pleasure them.
